notes.body: Elena mentioned her knee has been bothering her, especially in damp weather. She's looking forward to visiting the new local art gallery soon. Her favorite flowers are lilies.
Remembers my preference for dark chocolate over milk chocolate. She suggested a recipe for a new vegetarian lasagna last month. Needs help with her tablet sometimes.
Called to check in after my long work week. She's still planning her garden redesign for spring. Avoids spicy foods due to a sensitive stomach.
Kai just started a new coding project for fun, focusing on a retro game emulator. He's trying to cut down on caffeine. His daughter Lily started kindergarten this year.
Loves hiking and camping, especially in national parks. Mentioned an interest in learning to play the ukulele. Always remembers my birthday with a thoughtful card.
Excited about an upcoming trip to Japan next year. He's been saving up for it for a while. Avoids shellfish due to an allergy.
Liam expressed interest in taking a cooking class together. He loves trying new craft beers. He's been stressed about his work project deadline.
His cat, Mittens, is recovering well from her vet visit. He enjoys sci-fi movies and reading historical fiction. Always prefers experiences over material gifts.
Mentioned his dream of eventually living in a cabin in the mountains. He's very supportive of my career goals. Sensitive to strong perfumes.
Liam just got a promotion at work, which he's very proud of. He's planning a small celebration next weekend. He enjoys spicy food, unlike my mother.
Aisha is planning a trip to Southeast Asia next year. She's a big fan of true crime podcasts. Her sister, Zara, recently got engaged.
Prefers vegan options when dining out, if available. She is a talented amateur photographer and has an exhibition coming up. Loves board games.
David recently adopted a rescue dog named Buster. He's really into cycling these days. He's looking for recommendations for new fantasy novels.
Expressed frustration with his current work-life balance. He enjoys trying new coffee shops. His birthday is in two months.
Sophie is volunteering at the local animal shelter on weekends. She has a peanut allergy, so be mindful when preparing food. She loves indie music concerts.
She recently started a pottery class and is really enjoying it. Sophie prefers tea over coffee. Her younger brother is applying to colleges.
Marcus is a big fan of obscure documentaries. He's trying to learn Spanish. He mentioned wanting to get back into playing tennis.
He just got a new job in marketing. Marcus prefers outdoor activities to indoor ones. His car broke down last week.
Maya is an avid baker and loves experimenting with new recipes. She's planning a road trip along the coast this summer. Her dog, Charlie, is very energetic.
She mentioned an interest in sustainable living and reducing her carbon footprint. Maya dislikes overly sweet desserts. She likes historical dramas.
John recently moved to a new apartment in the downtown area. He's a casual golfer. Met him at a networking event.
Isabella is passionate about environmental causes. She's a vegetarian. Briefly discussed local politics.
Sarah is currently leading the new client onboarding project. She prefers concise emails over long meetings. Her son is applying for internships.
Expressed interest in developing her presentation skills. She is an early riser. Enjoys gardening in her free time.
Miguel is working on optimizing the backend database for the new platform. He enjoys playing chess during his lunch breaks. He's a fan of classical music.
Rebecca is keen on cross-departmental collaboration for the upcoming quarter. She values clear, data-driven reports. She recently mentioned wanting to learn to sail.
She has a strong interest in leadership development workshops. Rebecca prefers constructive feedback directly. Her son plays youth soccer.
Thomas is focused on improving team efficiency with new tools. He prefers morning meetings. He enjoys watching historical documentaries.
Chloe is eager to take on more responsibility in the marketing campaign. She's very organized. Her cat's name is Luna.
Omar is looking for opportunities to expand his skill set in data analysis. He's very meticulous in his work. He enjoys playing video games in his free time.
Susan emphasized the importance of continuous learning and professional networking. She's a strong advocate for work-life balance. She enjoys meditation.
Robert is keen on seeing Q3 results for the new product launch. He prefers direct communication. He has an interest in sustainable business practices.
Patricia just celebrated her big anniversary with her husband. She loves gardening and her roses are particularly beautiful this year. She enjoys historical romance novels.
She prefers to receive handwritten cards for special occasions. Patricia mentioned her granddaughter, Emily, is starting high school soon. She's a fantastic cook.
Patricia offered to share her famous apple pie recipe. She's planning a small family get-together next month. Reminded me about the family reunion in summer.
Jin is passionate about photography and recently won an award for his landscape work. He's trying to save up for a new camera lens. He has two cats, Miso and Sushi.
He always brings unique snacks to family gatherings. Jin is a big fan of live music, especially jazz. He's planning a trip to Yellowstone next year.
Jin mentioned he's been experimenting with fermenting foods. He prefers experiences over material gifts. He's good at remembering details about shared memories.
Elena just finished her marathon and achieved a personal best. She loves trying new vegan restaurants. Her dog, Max, had a minor surgery recently and is recovering.
She mentioned an interest in learning a new language, possibly Italian. Elena is incredibly organized and keeps a detailed journal. She prefers early morning workouts.
Elena offered to help me move some boxes next weekend. She's looking forward to a quiet evening with a good book. She enjoys spicy food and strong coffee.
She recommended a fantastic book on mindfulness last year. Elena has a great sense of humor. Her sister is expecting a baby next spring.

lifeEvents.note: Started new role at Tech Innovations
